display_text: Octarine Core, Cost: 4900: Provides +25% cooldown reduction to all spells and items, significantly increasing ability uptime and overall utility. Also offers a substantial boost to mana pool and regeneration, ideal for spell-reliant heroes who need frequent casting. The health increase improves survivability. Stats: Cost: 4900g, CDR: 25%, HP: +450, Mana: +450, Mana Regen: +6.

display_text: Octarine Core, Cost: 4900: Excellent synergy for heroes with long cooldown ultimates (Enigma, Faceless Void) and those who spam low-cooldown nukes (Leshrac, Tinker). display_text: Octarine Core, Cost: 4900: Situational against high-frequency spell enemies as reducing your own cooldowns allows for more frequent defensive or counter-initiation spells. The stats also provide survivability against magic and physical burst through increased health pool. Not a direct counter item but improves general resilience and response rate.
